Kipps.AI is your all-in-one AI assistant for marketing, sales, and customer support. Build AI agents that capture leads, qualify prospects, answer customers, and automate workflows—without complex setup. Designed for small teams to save time, reduce manual work, and scale faster with smart, always-on AI. Launch AI Voice, WhatsApp or Chat agents, and integrations in minutes—no heavy tech required. Scale faster, work smarter, and let AI handle the busywork while your team focuses on growth. [...] Report
